title: Revelations
tmdbOverview: A pastor who believes in divine revelation and a detective haunted by visions pursue a missing person case — exposing their own demons in the process.
synopsis: Released in 2025, Revelations is a thriller, crime and mystery film from South Korea. It carries a 6.0 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
